original_title: SONE-550 I ended up sharing a room with a new female junior co-worker on a business trip! The next morning, she was all lovey-dovey and wanted me to put it in her... Hime Hayasaka
overview: I was supposed to get back before the last train on my business trip, but... I ended up doing it! I managed to get a room, but I shared a room. "Senior, please be strong!" "I can't imagine sharing a room." Mistakes pile up and the mood is tense. My junior is always tsundere to me because I can't do my job. She's so cute when she smiles... I got drunk and woke up the next morning to find my junior sleeping with her defenseless ass exposed... What is this deja vu? ? The junior who hates me came to me and said, "Oh, did you forget about last night... It felt good," and I had a flashback to those words! ! I was tempted by the sight of my junior drunk and defenseless, and I forced myself to have sex with her! ! . "We still have time, so let's continue from yesterday." In contrast to last night, the gap between her wanting my dick while being close to me is irresistible! Our bodies are also great! The two of us are so into each other that we forget the check-out time and go crazy.
title: SONE 550 English Subtitle
